description: Toon beat-em-up brawler character, advanced move set: jump, air-attack, grab, throw, pickup, carry.

states.name: jump
states.action: Jump arc through pose and vertical body position only: anticipation, lift, airborne peak, and descent. Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
requirements: Show the jump through pose and vertical body position only.
Do not draw ground shadows, contact shadows, drop shadows, dust, or landing marks.
Keep the background outside the character perfectly flat chroma key with no darker key-colored patches.
Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.

states.name: air-attack
states.action: Airborne attack: windup, strike, and follow-through while airborne, through pose and an attached impact effect only. Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
requirements: Show the character airborne in every frame; do not include ground contact.
Any impact flash must be physically attached to or overlapping the character silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached impact stars, motion lines, or afterimages.
Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.

states.name: grab
states.action: Grab reach: extend arms forward and close onto an unseen opponent, pose only. Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
requirements: Show only the reach-and-clamp motion; do not draw a second character or opponent.
The row must unmistakably face right, viewed from the side.
Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.

states.name: throw
states.action: Throw follow-through: pivot, heave, and release, ending in a recovery stance. Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
requirements: Show only the throwing character's motion; do not draw a second character or thrown object.
The row must unmistakably face right, viewed from the side.
Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.

states.name: pickup
states.action: Item pickup: crouch down, grasp, and rise holding an unseen item close to the body. Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
requirements: Show only the picking-up motion; do not draw the item itself.
Start from standing and end standing, holding the pose that implies a held item.
Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.

states.name: carry
states.action: Carrying walk cycle: alternating stride while holding an unseen item or opponent against the body. Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face and travel right, viewed from the side.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw the carried item or opponent itself; show only the carrying posture.
Proportion-appropriate motion for toon build: clear cartoon silhouettes, moderate exaggeration.
